verses.latin_vulgate: Laus cantici ipsi David, in die ante sabbatum, quando fundata est terra.   Dominus regnavit, decorem indutus est :  indutus est Dominus fortitudinem, et præcinxit se.  Etenim firmavit orbem terræ, qui non commovebitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה מָלָךְ֮ גֵּא֢וּת לָ֫בֵ֥שׁ לָבֵ֣שׁ יְ֭הֹוָה עֹ֣ז הִתְאַזָּ֑ר אַף־תִּכּ֥וֹן תֵּ֝בֵ֗ל בַּל־תִּמּֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath reigned, he is clothed with beauty: the Lord is clothed with strength, and hath girded himself. For he hath established the world which shall not be moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on kuningas: hän on pukenut yllensä suuren kunnian: Herra on pukenut ja vyöttänyt itsensä väkevyydellä, ja on vahvistanut maan piirin, ettei sen pidä liikkuman.
verses.king_james: The Lord reigneth, he is clothed with majesty; the Lord is clothed with strength, wherewith he hath girded himself: the world also is stablished, that it cannot be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Parata sedes tua ex tunc ;  a sæculo tu es.
verses.douay_rheims: My throne is prepared from of old: thou art from everlasting.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siitä ajasta pysyy sinun istuimes vahvana: sinä olet ijankaikkinen.
verses.king_james: Thy throne is established of old: thou art from everlasting.

verses.latin_vulgate: Elevaverunt flumina, Domine,  elevaverunt flumina vocem suam ;  elevaverunt flumina fluctus suos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָשְׂא֤וּ נְהָר֨וֹת ׀ יְֽהֹוָ֗ה נָשְׂא֣וּ נְהָר֣וֹת קוֹלָ֑ם יִשְׂא֖וּ נְהָר֣וֹת דׇּכְיָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The floods have lifted up, O Lord: the floods have lifted up their voice. The floods have lifted up their waves,
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, vesikosket paisuvat, vesikosket paisuttavat pauhinansa, vesikosket paisuttavat aaltonsa.
verses.king_james: The floods have lifted up, O Lord, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their waves.

verses.latin_vulgate: a vocibus aquarum multarum.  Mirabiles elationes maris ;  mirabilis in altis Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִקֹּל֨וֹת ׀ מַ֤יִם רַבִּ֗ים אַדִּירִ֣ים מִשְׁבְּרֵי־יָ֑ם אַדִּ֖יר בַּמָּר֣וֹם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: With the noise of many waters. Wonderful are the surges of the sea: wonderful is the Lord on high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Aallot meressä ovat suuret ja pauhaavat hirmuisesti; mutta Herra on vielä väkevämpi korkeudessa.
verses.king_james: The Lord on high is mightier than the noise of many waters, yea, than the mighty waves of the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Testimonia tua credibilia facta sunt nimis ;  domum tuam decet sanctitudo, Domine,  in longitudinem dierum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵֽדֹתֶ֨יךָ ׀ נֶאֶמְנ֬וּ מְאֹ֗ד לְבֵיתְךָ֥ נַאֲוָה־קֹ֑דֶשׁ יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לְאֹ֣רֶךְ יָמִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Thy testimonies are become exceedingly credible: holiness becometh thy house, O Lord, unto length of days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun todistukses ovat aivan lujat: pyhyys on sinun huonees kaunistus, Herra, ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Thy testimonies are very sure: holiness becometh thine house, O Lord, for ever.
